raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation to immediate introspective action and acceptance of finitude as a binding personal commitment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a governing intelligence exists from which the self originates",
    "human life has a fixed, non-renewable temporal limit",
    "failure to achieve inner calm within that limit results in irreversible loss",
    "understanding cosmic nature is both possible and prerequisite for self-regulation"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a Stoic teleological framework; premises and conclusion follow once the existence of a divine source and the value of tranquility are granted",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient accepts or is open to a pantheistic or theistic metaphysics and treats mortality as a practical constraint on self-improvement",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the recipient holds a naturalistic worldview without a personal governor, or treats the statement as empirical prediction rather than value-laden exhortation"
}
